name: pingpt-extension
description: Pin individual ChatGPT messages, not the entire chat. Add custom names and tags, search instantly, and jump back to the original conversation.

scripts.build:chrome: rm -rf dist/chrome && mkdir -p dist/chrome && cp -r src/common/* dist/chrome/ && cp src/chrome/manifest.json dist/chrome/
scripts.build:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox && mkdir -p dist/firefox && cp -r src/common/* dist/firefox/ && cp src/firefox/manifest.json dist/firefox/
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.pack: npm run pack:chrome && npm run pack:firefox
scripts.dev:chrome: npm run build:chrome && echo 'Load dist/chrome in Chrome'
scripts.dev:firefox: npm run build:firefox && echo 'Load dist/firefox in Firefox'
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run pack
